headline: Labcorp and Epic Expand Collaboration to Advance Diagnostic Integration across Hospitals and Health Systems
summary: Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a global leader of innovative and comprehensive laboratory services, today announced an expanded collaboration with Epic, the nation's leading electronic health record (EHR) supporting hospitals and health systems. Through the collaboration, Labcorp's full test menu will be available through Aura, Epic's unified platform for ordering and receiving lab results. The integration will drive meaningful operational efficiencies, streamline lab ordering for clinicians and care teams
